steps.title: Identify the numerical contrast between the two wind farms
steps.content: The passage describes two offshore wind farms with starkly different power outputs: the Beatrice at 588 MW and Hornsea Project One at 1,218 MW. The transition must signal how these numbers relate to each other.

steps.title: Match the comparison relationship
steps.content:
By comparison directly signals a side-by-side contrast of the two wind farms' power outputs.

The other three options misidentify the relationship: For instance treats one farm as an example of the other; As a result wrongly implies causal connection; That is suggests restatement rather than contrast.

That confirms D is correct.
